array.string: cd /Users/shunsukehayashi/dev/tools/agent-skill-bus && source ~/.config/last30days/.env && last30days "AI agents autonomous 2026" --deep --json > /tmp/note-research.json && openclaw agent message writer "以下のJSONから2500字のnote記事を生成: $(cat /tmp/note-research.json | head -200)" && npx agent-skill-bus record-run --agent writer --skill note-publisher --task "weekly-auto" --result success --score 0.9
